gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/434)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/434)
text: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ يُحِبُّ أَنْ يَسْتَعِطَ بِدُهْنِ السِّمْسِمِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from one of his companions, from a cousin of Al Wazaie, from Mas’ada Bin Al Yas’a, from Qays Al Bahily,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> used to love smelling the sesame oil’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘ Abd Allah from certain persons of his people from son of the daughter al-Awzahy from Mas‘adah ibn al-Yasa‘ from Qays al-Bahiliy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, liked to inhale the fragrance of sesame oil.’”
